concierge.title: Saturday — Recharge
notes: 🏆 RISE Challenge (Virginia) — Stability accepted! Complete the application
🎤 InnovateSouth deck — finish it, time the pitch (must be under 4 min), upload to Claude for evaluation & improvements
☀️ No screens before coffee and a walk
🛒 Restock if needed — fresh ingredients beat takeout
📚 Read something that's not a screen (book, magazine)
🎶 Check WWOZ / InkThorn for live music tonight
🌿 Uptown walk — Napoleon to Audubon, clear the week

private: 🌹 Date night with Camille tonight — make it count
💌 She loves when you just handle the reservation without being asked
💌 Dress up a little — she notices

blocks.label: Slow Start
tips: No screens for 30 minutes. Walk. Coffee. Breathe.
Uptown on Saturday morning is as good as it gets.

blocks.label: Magazine Street Run
tips: Restock for the week. Fresh ingredients beat DoorDash.
Rouses on Magazine or Whole Foods on Magazine — your call

recommendation.name: Rouses Market
recommendation.note: Local grocery chain. Good produce, great deli, very New Orleans.

blocks.label: Audubon Walk
tips: Audubon Park loop is 1.8 miles — perfect Saturday reset
Oaks, runners, dogs — the whole Uptown scene

recommendation.name: Audubon Park
recommendation.note: 10 minutes on foot from Napoleon & Magazine.

blocks.label: Read / Rest
tips: Book, not screen. Porch if weather cooperates.
You process better when you slow down. Trust it.

blocks.label: Light Reyla Review
tips: Optional — an hour max. Prep for Monday, don't grind.
Saturday is for recharging, not depleting.

blocks.label: Saturday Night Out
tips: Frenchmen Street or Uptown — something live is always on
Check WWOZ picks from Thursday for tonight

recommendation.name: Frenchmen Street
recommendation.note: Saturday night in New Orleans. No further explanation needed.

blocks.label: Willie Green III
tips: Live tonight — courtesy of WWOZ & InkThorn Community Events

recommendation.name: Willie Green III
recommendation.note: Tonight at 7:00 PM. More info: https://wwoz.org/events/1348381
